_comment: Curated search TYPE tags per rs_gear: space-separated keywords (English + Spanish, accent-free) so typing a pedal TYPE in the Gear catalog / Add-piece picker surfaces every gear of that type, even when its display name is a model code (e.g. MT-2) that lacks the word. Authoritative — overrides the codename heuristic. Filled category by category.
